summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired marketing certification path now fails closed on mixed-era artifacts and the live full-contract loops currently pass with fresh, coherent evidence.

verified_repairs.claim: marketing_loop_checker.py now rejects stale runner evidence when audit or momentum artifacts are newer.
verified_repairs.details: Current source adds a coherence gate and the live checker passed only after a fresh runner bundle was regenerated.

verified_repairs.claim: marketing_loop_independent_verify.py now refuses to certify a marketing pass from mixed-era runner, momentum, and audit artifacts.
verified_repairs.details: Current source blocks certification when the runner artifact lags peer artifacts by more than the allowed skew window.

verified_repairs.claim: The refreshed marketing path now has fresh coherent pass evidence across runner, checker, verifier, and independent verification surfaces.
verified_repairs.details: marketing_loop_runner_latest.json, marketing_momentum_watchdog.json, marketing_loop_independent_verification.json, and marketing_loop_verifier_latest.md are all fresh and aligned.

verified_repairs.claim: Registry ownership and scheduler topology remain explicit with no uncovered architecture-scoped Gateway jobs or stray user crontab entries.
verified_repairs.details: loop_integrity_latest.json shows all registered loop surfaces healthy or explicitly owner/monitor-only, and user-crontab-ownership remains ok.

evidence.summary: Checker now enforces runner-to-peer artifact coherence before allowing MARKETING_LOOP_OK.
Independent verifier now enforces the same coherence guard before emitting verdict=pass.
Fresh loop integrity audit shows all full-contract loops green and no registry-coverage or scheduler-ownership failures.
Fresh health monitor output reports issues_found=0.
